title: senecio oerstedianus
intro: Senecio oerstedianus, also known as Oersted's ragwort, is a plant species within the dandelion-like genus Senecio. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant. The health benefits of Senecio oerstedianus include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems. Senecio oerstedianus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which may be used to harness its medicinal properties.
